# SAIL: Spectroscopy and AI Lab (Joonyoung F. Joung Lab, Kookmin University), full content

> {{ site.description }}

The Spectroscopy and AI Lab (SAIL), led by {{ site.data.pi.name }} ({{ site.data.pi.name_ko }}), {{ site.data.pi.title }} in the {{ site.data.pi.department }} at {{ site.data.pi.institution }}, integrates machine learning with chemistry. Website: {{ site.url }}. This file is the expanded, full-text companion to {{ site.url }}/llms.txt.

## Research areas

{{ a.body | strip_html | strip_newlines }}
{% endfor %}
